WakeUpPoseidon3ED_1.korean: 후엥… 아이스 아메리카노 하나… 네? 샷 추가요…? 네? 얼음은 보통으로…?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_1.english: Ugh… one iced Americano… huh? An extra shot…? Huh? Regular ice…?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_2.korean: 하으… 그, 그러니까 아이스 아메리카노 주문에… 머, 뭐였죠?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_2.english: Haa… um, about the iced Americano order… wh-what was it again?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_4.korean: 아! 샷 추가, 얼음은 보통! 알겠어요!
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_4.english: Ah! Shot extra, regular ice! Got it!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_5.english: And here's the order for table 3.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_6.korean: 이쪽은 내가 맡을 테니까, 너는 주방에 주문 전달하고 서빙해 줘.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_6.english: I'll take this side, so you deliver the orders to the kitchen and do the serving.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_7.english: Ah… yes! Got it! Leave it to me!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_8.english: Here! Orders for tables 2 and 6 are ready!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_10.korean: …그리고 아직 4번 테이블 메뉴가 안 나왔는데 괜찮나?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_10.english: …and the menu for table 4 hasn't come out yet— is that okay?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_11.korean: 아, 죄송해요. 예상보다 주문이 많아서 늦어졌어요.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_11.english: Ah, sorry. There were more orders than expected, so it's delayed.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_13.korean: 음, 괜찮다. 이건 내가 만들 테니 너는 다른 주문을 처리해라.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_13.english: Hmm, that's fine. I'll make this, so you handle the other orders.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_14.english: Thank you. Please take care of it!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_16.english: Yeah yeah! It's a good flow!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_17.english: Pretty great for the first day!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_18.korean: 오늘 도와주러 와 줘서 정말 고마워.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_18.english: Thanks so much for coming to help today.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_19.korean: 뭘, 우리도 너희한테 신세 진 적 있잖아.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_19.english: What? We've owed you one too.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_20.korean: 필요하면 불러 달라고 한 것도 우리고.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_20.english: We were the ones who said to call us if you need anything.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_21.korean: 이렇게 빨리 찾아오게 될 줄은 몰랐지만.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_21.english: I didn't expect you'd come this quickly.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_22.korean: 게다가… 재미있는 장면까지 보게 해줘서 오히려 고마울 정도야~
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_22.english: And… I'm actually grateful you let us see the funny moments~

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_23.korean: 후후후, 이 멀린… 한다면 하는 인물이지요!
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_23.english: Hehe, this Merlin… truly a man of action!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_24.english: I never thought it would actually succeed…

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_25.korean: 저 레모네이드 감마가 메이드 접대를 하다니… 진짜 존나 대박 사건!
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_25.english: Lemonade Gamma doing maid service… that's seriously an epic incident!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_26.english: I can’t believe it even while watching.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_27.english: And she's even doing better than I expected.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_28.korean: 감마 대장ㅡ 아니 점장님이 하겠다고 선언한 이상 제대로 한다고 하셨으니까요!
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_28.english: Since Captain Gamma— I mean the manager— declared they'd do it, they said they'd do it properly!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_29.korean: 전에 너희가 도와줬을 땐 네가 점장이었던 것 같은데.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_29.english: When you helped before, I think you were the manager.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_30.english: Why aren't you the one this time?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_31.korean: 뭐, 그때는 감마 대장님이 정식 합류하기 전이기도 했고...
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_31.english: Well, back then Gamma hadn't officially joined yet…

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_32.korean: 무엇보다 포세이돈의 이름 걸고 하는 거라면, 점장은 역시 감마 대장님이 맞지!
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_32.english: And above all, if it's under Poseidon's name, the manager should be Gamma!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_33.korean: 그래~ 그래. 하여간 네 그 대장님 사랑은 알아줘야 한다니까.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_33.english: Yeah, yeah. Anyway, you have to admit your love for that captain.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_34.english: Anyway… I saw it briefly earlier.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_35.english: The sign placed in front of the door…

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_38.korean: 점장님이 강력하게 주장하셔서… 어쩔 수 없었어.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_38.english: The manager insisted so strongly… I had no choice.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_40.korean: - 그러고 보니 신규 점포 허가를 내린 카페 포세이돈 오픈이 오늘이었지?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_40.english: - Come to think of it, Cafe Poseidon, which got approval for a new store, opened today, right?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_41.korean: - 지금쯤이면 열었을 테니 한번 가 볼까?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_41.english: - It should be open by now, so shall we go check it out?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_43.korean: - 감마 쪽에서 카페를 하겠다고 선언했을 때는 놀랐지만, 오르카에 잘 적응했다고 보면 되려나?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_43.english: - I was surprised when Gamma announced they'd open a cafe, but I guess they've settled into Orca well enough?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_44.korean: - 그건 그렇고 감마가 내려 주는 커피를 마시는 날이 올 줄이야.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_44.english: - Anyway, I never thought the day would come when I'd drink coffee brewed by Gamma.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_45.english: - I'm really looking forward to this!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_53.korean: - 나… 포세이돈 애들한테 뭐 잘못한 게 있었나?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_53.english: - Did I do something wrong to Poseidon's kids?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_54.korean: - 얼마 전까지만 해도 아무 문제 없었는데?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_54.english: - There were no problems until recently.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_56.korean: - 생각해보니 감마와는 그렇게 자주 만나서 얘기하지 않은 것 같은…
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_56.english: - Come to think of it, I haven't really met up with Gamma that often...

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_57.korean: - 좀 더… 감마랑 시간을 보냈어야 했나?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_57.english: - Should I have spent a bit more time with Gamma?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_58.korean: - 아니, 꼭 그게 이유라고 단정 지을 수는...
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_58.english: - No, I can't just assume that's the reason...

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_63.english: Don't just stand there—get up, Rhode.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_64.korean: 내일도 아침부터 준비해야 하니 어서 숙소로 돌아가요.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_64.english: We have to be ready again tomorrow morning, so let's head back to the quarters.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_65.korean: …메로페 님, 저희 언제까지 이 일을 계속해야 하는 건가요?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_65.english: …Merope, how long do we have to keep doing this?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_66.korean: 음… 다른 임무가 없다면, 앞으로도 계속?
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_66.english: Hmm... if there are no other missions, will it just go on?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_68.korean: 이럴 줄 알았으면 케이크에 현혹돼서 한다고 말하지 않는 건데...
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_68.english: If I'd known this would happen, I wouldn't have said I was doing it just because the cake lured me...

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_71.english: Captain Gamma, thanks for all your hard work today!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_72.english: I saw you from afar... your hospitality's perfect now, huh?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_73.korean: 이 멀린, 감마 대장님의 메이드 접대를 볼 수 있었으니… 더는 여한이 없습니다.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_73.english: Seeing your maid service, Captain Gamma, leaves me with no regrets.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_74.english: Too noisy. And it's still far from enough.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_77.korean: 오늘 아서가… 가게 앞까지 왔다가 돌아갔다고 해요.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_77.english: They say Arthur came up to the storefront today, then turned around.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_80.english: Since I started, I’m determined to do it right...

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_81.english: I’ll show that guy a “proper” hospitality.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_82.english: Even a dragon wouldn’t be able to outdo it.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_83.korean: 좋아요! 그렇다면 이 부점장 멀린이, 점장님을 위해 연습 상대가 되어 드리겠습니다!
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_83.english: Great! Then I, Assistant Manager Merlin, will be your practice partner for the manager!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_84.english: Could you treat me as if I were Arthur?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_85.english: I’ll even teach you a secret move that “wins” over Arthur!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_86.english: Just trust me and follow my lead!

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_88.korean: 그렇다면 오늘 밤, 늦게까지 상대해 줘야겠어.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_88.english: Then tonight, I’ll have to stay up late with you.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_89.english: Gasp... staying up late with Captain Gamma... just the two of us...?

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_91.english: I don’t know what you’re imagining, but be ready.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_92.korean: 더는 못하겠다고 해도… 절대 안 놔줄 거다.
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_92.english: Even if you say you can’t go on... I’ll never let you quit.

WakeUpPoseidon3ED_47.korean: 《오르카 소속 사령관은 본 매장 출입이 제한됩니다.》
WakeUpPoseidon3ED_47.english: Orca-affiliated commanders are prohibited from entering this establishment.
